sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 121:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 121:1
items.html: They are four phases ZON: ZON of the vessel of Keter, ZON of the vessel of Hochma, ZON of the vessel of Bina, and ZON of the vessel of Yesod and Malchut.
